---
title: "GWAS Meta-Analysis QC Report"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
params:
  phenotype: ""
  results_dir: ""
  filter_stats: ""
  ldsc_h2: ""
  has_vep: false
  has_hyprcoloc: false
  has_flames: false
---

```{python}
import base64
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import display, Markdown, HTML
import pandas as pd
import glob

phenotype     = params["phenotype"]
results_dir   = Path(params["results_dir"])
filter_stats  = Path(params["filter_stats"])
ldsc_h2_path  = Path(params["ldsc_h2"])

qc_plots_dir  = results_dir / "plots" / "qc" / phenotype

def img_b64(path, caption="", width="100%"):
    """Return an inline base64 HTML image string, or empty string if file missing."""
    p = Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return ""
    data = base64.b64encode(p.read_bytes()).decode()
    ext  = p.suffix.lstrip(".")
    mime = "image/png" if ext == "png" else f"image/{ext}"
    cap  = f"<figcaption>{caption}</figcaption>" if caption else ""
    return (f'<figure><img src="data:{mime};base64,{data}" '
            f'style="width:{width};max-width:900px"/>{cap}</figure>')

def img(path, caption="", width="100%"):
    html = img_b64(path, caption, width)
    if html:
        display(HTML(html))
    else:
        display(Markdown(f"> **Plot not found:** `{Path(path).name}`"))

display(Markdown(f"**Phenotype:** {phenotype}"))
```

## Input Harmonisation

```{python}
if filter_stats.exists():
    fs = pd.read_csv(filter_stats, sep="\t")
    display(Markdown(f"Filter statistics across **{fs['COHORT'].nunique() if 'COHORT' in fs.columns else 'N/A'}** cohorts."))
    display(HTML(fs.to_html(index=False, classes="table table-striped table-sm", border=0)))
else:
    display(Markdown("> Filter statistics file not found."))
```

```{python}
if ldsc_h2_path.exists():
    ldsc = pd.read_csv(ldsc_h2_path, sep="\t")
    display(HTML(ldsc.to_html(index=False, classes="table table-striped table-sm", border=0)))
```

## Cross-Cohort Comparison

```{python}
for suffix, caption in [
    ("filter-cascade",         "Variant filter cascade across all cohorts"),
    ("ldsc-summary",           "LDSC h² summary across cohorts"),
    ("effect-size-comparison", "Effect size comparison across cohorts"),
]:
    img(qc_plots_dir / f"{phenotype}.{suffix}.png", caption)
```

## Per-Cohort QC Plots

```{python}
#| output: asis
plot_suffixes = [
    ("precision-sample-size",   "Precision vs N"),
    ("eaf-distribution",        "EAF distribution"),
    ("zscore-distribution",     "Z-score distribution"),
    ("effect-size-distribution","Effect size distribution"),
]

# Discover cohort-population combinations from filenames
pattern = str(qc_plots_dir / f"{phenotype}-*.precision-sample-size.png")
files = sorted(glob.glob(pattern))
cohort_pops = []
for f in files:
    name = Path(f).name
    # Remove phenotype prefix and suffix to get cohort-population token
    token = name.replace(f"{phenotype}-", "").replace(".precision-sample-size.png", "")
    cohort_pops.append(token)

if cohort_pops:
    md = "::: {.panel-tabset}\n\n"
    for cp in cohort_pops:
        md += f"## {cp}\n\n"
        for suffix, _ in plot_suffixes:
            p = qc_plots_dir / f"{phenotype}-{cp}.{suffix}.png"
            html = img_b64(p, width="80%")
            if html:
                md += html + "\n\n"
        md += "\n"
    md += ":::\n"
    display(Markdown(md))
else:
    display(Markdown("> No per-cohort QC plots found."))
```

## Input GWAS QQ Plots

```{python}
#| output: asis
qq_files = sorted(glob.glob(str(qc_plots_dir / f"{phenotype}-*.qq.png")))
# Exclude meta QQ files
qq_files = [f for f in qq_files if "-meta.qq" not in f]

if qq_files:
    md = "::: {.panel-tabset}\n\n"
    for f in qq_files:
        token = Path(f).name.replace(f"{phenotype}-", "").replace(".qq.png", "")
        html = img_b64(f, width="80%")
        md += f"## {token}\n\n"
        md += html + "\n\n"
    md += ":::\n"
    display(Markdown(md))
else:
    display(Markdown("> No input QQ plots found."))
```

## Meta-Analysis QC

```{python}
#| output: asis

# QQ plots for each meta-analysis population
meta_qq = sorted(glob.glob(str(qc_plots_dir / f"{phenotype}-*-meta.qq.png")))
meta_het = sorted(glob.glob(str(qc_plots_dir / f"{phenotype}-*-meta.heterogeneity.png")))
meta_ncon = sorted(glob.glob(str(qc_plots_dir / f"{phenotype}-*-meta.n-contributions.png")))

all_pops = sorted({
    Path(f).name.replace(f"{phenotype}-", "").replace("-meta.qq.png", "")
    for f in meta_qq
} | {
    Path(f).name.replace(f"{phenotype}-", "").replace("-meta.heterogeneity.png", "")
    for f in meta_het
})

if all_pops:
    md = "::: {.panel-tabset}\n\n"
    for pop in all_pops:
        md += f"## {pop.upper()}\n\n"
        for fpath, label in [
            (qc_plots_dir / f"{phenotype}-{pop}-meta.qq.png",             "QQ plot"),
            (qc_plots_dir / f"{phenotype}-{pop}-meta.heterogeneity.png",  "I² heterogeneity"),
            (qc_plots_dir / f"{phenotype}-{pop}-meta.n-contributions.png", "N contributions"),
        ]:
            html = img_b64(fpath, width="80%")
            if html:
                md += f"**{label}**\n\n" + html + "\n\n"
        md += "\n"
    md += ":::\n"
    display(Markdown(md))
else:
    display(Markdown("> No meta-analysis QC plots found."))
```

```{python}
# Credset size distribution
img(qc_plots_dir / f"{phenotype}.credset-sizes.png",
    "99% credible set size distribution by population")
```
